ab: ta kadjaman gemalju aken a ma tatakisian.
en: I was late for school this morning.

ab: tazua vaika sema tatakesiyan, ini paqenetj anga aken a masi kabang.
ch: 去學校的時候，我忘了帶書包。
en: When I was going to school, I forgot to bring my backpack.

ab: ini ken na kemacu ta nanemangau.
en: I didn’t bring anything with me.

ab: ka kitulutulu tazua, maciyur aken kata ku salasaladj a pacun ta qadupu.
ch: 上課的時候，我和同學一起看課本。
en: During class, I and my classmates read the textbook together.

ab: ka semekiseking tazua, pasedjaman aken ta inpic kata siquliqulip na salasaladj.
ch: 考試的時候，同學借我筆和橡皮擦。
en: During the exam, a classmate lent me a pen and an eraser.

ab: qaqivuin aken na sinsi, “nu tjaivililj gacaljuanga kirimu, maya gemalju anga!”aya!
ch: 老師跟我說：「下次早點起床，不要再遲到了!」
en: The teacher told me, “Wake up earlier next time and don’t be late again!”
